name: The JerryMaya Detective Agency
short_description: Unleash your inner detective in The JerryMaya Detective Agency, an exciting puzzle platforming adventure for kids and families! Single Player or Local Co-op: Solve mysteries with a friend for double the fun!
detailed_description:
Co-op Mode! – Play with a friend in a brand-new way to experience this quirky detective adventure.

Unleash your inner detective in The JerryMaya Detective Agency, an exciting puzzle platforming adventure for kids and families! Based on the beloved Swedish children’s books, this interactive mystery game invites young detectives to solve crimes, uncover clues, and explore the quirky town of Valleby.

Two Ways to Play:

• Single Player: Play as both Jerry and Maya, switching between them to solve mysteries solo.

• Local Co-op: Team up with a friend! One of you plays as Jerry, and the other plays as Maya. Work together to solve mysteries.

What’s New in the Steam Edition?

• Local Co-op: Solve mysteries with a friend for double the fun!

• Enhanced Gameplay: Play through polished levels full of puzzles and platforming challenges.

Explore Valleby and Put Your Detective Skills to the Test:

• Solve intriguing mysteries: Where’s the missing diamond? Who’s behind the stolen muffins?

• Navigate tricky platformer levels: Work individually or together to overcome clever obstacles and puzzles.

• Meet Valleby’s quirky residents: Each character brings their own unique stories and personalities.

• Find clues and uncover evidence: Interview suspects, gather information, and solve the crime!

With countless mystery combinations, The JerryMaya Detective Agency offers a fun, replayable experience that blends entertainment with education.

Key Features:

• Single Player and Local Co-op Modes: Solve mysteries solo or with a friend.

• Engaging Puzzle Platforming Gameplay: A perfect mix of fun and critical thinking.

• Charming Art Style: Inspired by the beloved Swedish book series.

• Family-Friendly Fun: Suitable for all ages with wholesome content.

• Replayable Mysteries: Discover endless variations to keep the game fresh and exciting.

Are you ready to crack the case?

Download The JerryMaya Detective Agency – Steam Edition today and start your adventure!

The game is based on the Swedish book series ( LasseMaja / LasseMajas Detektivbyrå in Swedish ) .

supported_languages: English, Danish, Finnish, Norwegian, Polish, Swedish, German
